Go + Elixir broker seam: Go publishes NATS JetStream events, Elixir subscribes with a durable consumer. Shows stream setup, event schema, health probe, and docker-compose.
Go + Python REST seam: Go gateway calls Python scoring service synchronously. Shows downstream health probe pattern, JSON schema, and docker-compose.
Kotlin + Rust gRPC seam: Kotlin calls Rust compute server via typed RPC. Shows .proto contract, stub generation, health probe, and docker-compose.
Go + Elixir + Python trio: Go publishes jobs via NATS, Elixir coordinates and calls Python for scoring, Elixir fans out results. Shows both broker and REST seams with cascading healthchecks.

Go + Rust + Python trio: Go orchestrates gRPC call to Rust for preprocessing, then REST call to Python for ML scoring. Shows proto contract (processing.v1), pipeline topology, and dual downstream health probe.

Clojure + Go Kafka broker seam: Clojure produces enriched domain events to a Kafka topic; Go consumes them with a consumer group and manual offset commit. Shows KRaft setup, topic naming, event schema, and docker-compose.

Elixir + Clojure RabbitMQ broker seam: Clojure (Langohr) produces enriched domain task events to a RabbitMQ topic exchange; Elixir (Broadway + broadway_rabbitmq) consumes them as a work queue. Shows exchange/queue/binding setup, DLX pattern, prefetch configuration, and docker-compose.

Rust + Python gRPC seam: Rust (tonic) serves as the hot-path ML inference engine; Python (grpcio) calls it as an orchestrator. Shows proto contract, tonic server, Python gRPC client, downstream health probe, and docker-compose with Rust build time considerations.

Node + Go REST seam: Node (Apollo Server / GraphQL BFF) resolves queries by calling a Go domain service (Echo) over HTTP/REST. Shows GraphQL resolver-to-REST pattern, downstream health probe, and docker-compose.

Scala + Rust gRPC seam: Scala Akka Streams pipeline delegates per-element hot-path compute to a Rust tonic gRPC server using mapAsync. Shows KernelService proto contract (kernel.v1), Akka Streams gRPC integration via sbt-akka-grpc, and docker-compose with JVM + Rust build considerations.

Node + Elixir NATS broker seam (bidirectional): Node (TypeScript/Hono) publishes client actions to NATS; Elixir (Gnat/GenServer) processes them and publishes state updates back through NATS to Node. Shows the collaborative app pattern: client connection layer (Node) + distributed state (Elixir).

Elixir + Rust NIF/Port seam: Rust (Rustler) compiles into the Elixir BEAM VM as a native implemented function. Shows compute_hash and normalize_vector NIFs, the {:ok, result} Erlang term return convention, the Rustler init! macro, and when to use Port instead of NIF for unsafe operations. No docker-compose — this is an in-process seam.

Elixir + Go + Rust trio seam: Elixir (Gnat/GenServer) coordinates work by publishing to NATS JetStream; Go workers subscribe and call Rust (tonic/gRPC KernelService.Transform) for compute; Go publishes completion back to Elixir. Shows the inverted coordination topology (Elixir as orchestrator), NATS JetStream + gRPC dual seams, closed-loop coordination, and the kernel.v1 proto shared with scala-rust-grpc.

Node + Go + Python trio seam: Node (Apollo Server GraphQL BFF) calls Go (Echo domain service) over REST; Go calls Python (FastAPI ML) over REST for recommendation scoring. Shows the consumer product stack with cascading REST seams, Go as internal orchestrator, downstream health probes, and the Node→Go→Python vs Node→Go+Python topology trade-off.
